news.t: Aptus Capital Advisors Launches the Aptus Enhanced Yield ETF (CBOE: JUCY) as Aptus ETFs Crosses $2B in Assets

overview.description: The Aptus Enhanced Yield ETF (JUCY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds US treasuries and agency securities, combined with an option writing strategy using equity-linked notes. The fund seeks to provide stability and income. JUCY was launched on Oct 31, 2022 and is issued by Aptus Capital Advisors.

data.title: Aptus Capital Advisors Launches the Aptus Enhanced Yield ETF (CBOE: JUCY) as Aptus ETFs Crosses $2B in Assets
